sourcesContent:
# composition-and-boundary fixture: every core
# construct in every applicable matrix position — member-object,
# call-callee, argument, assignment-value, return — with trivia at block
# boundaries. Inapplicable cells, noted per construct:
#   - while/until are statement-only here (expression/postfix forms
#     are rewriter territory)
#   - compound assignment as call-callee is omitted: pinned in the
#     emitter tests instead — a naive lowering of a
#     parenthesized-assign callee to a comma expression, out of scope
#   - exponentiation as call-callee is omitted as nonsense (calling a
#     number); grouping in callee position is pinned by (a ?? b)(1)
#   - `!` in member-object/callee position is omitted from this
#     fixture: the grouping is load-bearing ((!x).y without it emits
#     !x.y, changing meaning); pinned in emitter tests

def pick(a, b)
  return a ?? b

def powret(a)
  return 2 ** a

def bump(a)
  return a += 1

# literals: member-object / argument / assignment-value / return(pick)
lit1 = true.toString
lit2 = undefined.toString
lit3 = f(true, false)
lit4 = f(null, undefined)
lit5 = null ?? undefined
u = pick(true, false)

# logical + aliases + not: member-object / call-callee / argument / value
v = (x && y).toString
v2 = (x and y).z
w = (a ?? b)(1)
r = f(x || y, not z)
r2 = !x && y

# exponentiation: member-object / argument / assignment-value
p1 = (2 ** 3).toString
p2 = f(2 ** 3)
s = 2 ** f(3)

# compound assignment: member-object / argument / assignment-value /
# return(bump) / continuation forms
c1 = (a += 1).b
c2 = f(b2 += 1)
q2 = (b3 ??= 7)
c3 = x and= y
c4 = x or= y
c5 +=
  f(9)

if true
  t = null ?? 1

# trivia at a block boundary

while v && w

  # trivia inside a block
  v = false

until lit1

  # trivia inside an until block
  lit1 = true

q = pick(2 ** 3, x **= 2)
